channel.title: Alvaro Martin Ruiz | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content on Alvaro Martin Ruiz | Portfolio

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
This is my very first blog post on my new developer portfolio. Built with Hugo and the Aafu theme!

Here is the latest version of my research.

Overview

In this paper, we explore the fundamentals of Brownian Motion, its mathematical properties, and how it can be modeled. The document acts as an in-depth dive into stochastic processes.

item.title: Demo Page
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: luctus enim ultricies auctor pulvinar nam etiam
item.description:
donec lacinia eleifend sem a

Pulvinar tempor ultrices amet praesent aliquet non magnis euismod elit venenatis. Aliqua consequat tristique erat nulla sit risus aliqua posuere. Potenti natoque augue proin accimsan risus scelerisque id integer curabitur mattis amet quisque. Aliquet porta sit sapien natoque sed fringilla, madssa suspendisse vivamus placerat sociis condimentum ridiculus. Natoque egestas non lectus pellentesque nunc mattis eu ridiculus pretium maecenas ligula. Gravida facilisis sem mollis sagittis aliquet ornare bibendum, leo nec morbi tortor diam maecenas tempor.
